name: small accounting firms processing 5–15 clients per quarter tool
description: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 clients per quarter, manual preparation causes late submissions. We automate tax filings instead of manual tax filing processes.

problem_solved: manual preparation of quarterly tax filings
